default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's draft content strategy and topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Primary Goal:** Correct the "Fleet is not an MDM" narrative in LLMs, which stems from outdated online content. The strategy will build foundational content to educate LLMs and establish Fleet's enterprise credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Strategy Feedback:** Brock approved the overall approach but requested merging the "Apple" and "Cross-Platform" clusters. Rationale: avoid reinforcing platform distinctions, which conflicts with Fleet's core value of simplifying management across all OSs.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [**New Cluster:** A new cluster on "Zero-Day Support" for major OS updates was added. This is a critical enterprise concern, as delayed compatibility prevents customers from applying security patches.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [**Process Assurance:** Brock expressed concerns about factual accuracy and future-proofing content. Aida confirmed the process is human-led, using a fact-checker and editor to ensure quality before scaling to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2164.0)

## Topics

### The Core Problem: Inaccurate LLM Data

  - [**Challenge:** LLMs provide inaccurate, outdated information about Fleet, including the claim that it is "not an MDM."](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A lack of foundational content on Fleet's site for LLMs to ingest.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Goal:** Correct the narrative by building a comprehensive content library that educates LLMs on Fleet's current capabilities and enterprise positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Target Audience:** Enterprises (\>700 employees) with significant Mac fleets evaluating MDM solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Success Metric:** LLM visibility tracked via a Scrunch dashboard, which monitors Fleet's presence in industry-relevant prompts vs. competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Content Strategy & Topic Clusters

  - [**Analysis:** Fleet's current "guides" are product-driven with minimal organic visibility (19 URLs ranking for \~30 keywords).](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [**Competitor Gap:** Competitors (Jamf, SimpleMDM) succeed with foundational content ("what is X") and commercial-intent content (comparison listicles) that informs LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [**Proposed Clusters (Draft):**](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
    1.  [**MDM Fundamentals:** Foundational definitions (e.g., MDM vs. MAM).](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
    2.  [**Commercial Intent:** Comparison and alternative listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
    3.  [**Apple Ecosystem Management:** Apple-specific topics (e.g., Apple Business Manager).](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
    4.  [**Cross-Platform Device Management:** Multi-OS management (Mac, Windows, Linux).](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
    5.  [**Enterprise Security & Compliance:** Topics for enterprise buyers (e.g., encryption, compliance).](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)

### Feedback & Revisions

  - [**Cluster 3 & 4 → Merge:** Brock requested merging the "Apple Ecosystem" and "Cross-Platform" clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Separating them conflicts with Fleet's core value of simplifying management across all OSs. It risks reinforcing platform distinctions, which could become outdated information, similar to the "not an MDM" narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [**New Cluster → Zero-Day Support:** A new cluster will focus on "Zero-Day Support" for major OS updates.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a critical enterprise concern. Delayed compatibility prevents customers from applying security patches, creating compliance risks.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [**Keyword Focus:** "Zero-day support for major OS updates."](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Content Generation Process

  - [**Process:** Human-led workflow to ensure accuracy and quality.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
    1.  [**Keyword Research:** Manual research by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)
    2.  [**Outline Generation:** Atlas platform analyzes top-ranking content via SEMrush API.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)
    3.  [**Research Report:** Atlas compiles a report using Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
    4.  [**Fact-Checking:** An automated fact-checker reviews the draft.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
    5.  [**Human Editing:** A human editor reviews for accuracy, tone, and messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
  - [**Ramp-Up:** 1 calibration article → 3 articles/week → 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2386.0)
      - [Share the content strategy doc in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2398.0)
      - [Rework topic clusters based on feedback (merge Apple/Cross-Platform, add Zero-Day Support).](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
      - [Present 40–50 initial blog ideas for review next week.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2043.0)
  - [**Brock:**](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
      - [Meet with Erik on Friday to finalize the "Company Context" artifact, which is a critical input for the content generation process.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
      - [Book the Friday meeting with Brock to finalize the "Company Context" artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/12s31Ywz-MWSMkenV8wMewiwgXms-q_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)

action_items.description: Share content strategy doc in Slack to Brock & Irena
Validate SEMrush zero-day support keywords; add to strategy
Schedule Fri working session w/ Brock re: Company Context edits
